g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the multiple comparisons problem in RLM and how is it corrected?')
sendPrompt('What correction methods does RLM use for multiple comparisons?')
sendPrompt('What statistical tests does RLM run on in-sample data?')
sendPrompt('What is the Sharpe ratio threshold in RLM?')
sendPrompt('What is profit factor in RLM analysis?')
sendPrompt('How does walk-forward validation work in RLM?')
sendPrompt('How does RLM segment results by market regime?')
sendPrompt('How does RLM detect edge decay over time?')
sendPrompt('What is the regime shift test in RLM?')
sendPrompt('How is the composite confidence score calculated in RLM?')
sendPrompt('What do the three verdict states mean in RLM?')
sendPrompt('What happens to inconclusive hypotheses in RLM?')
sendPrompt('What happens to rejected hypotheses in RLM?')
